elements.title: lang::report_page_081_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ass_s.id,
       kbi_c.fullname                     AS course,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.idnumber,
       kbi_u.id                           AS userid,
       kbi_ass.name                       AS assignment,
       kbi_u.lastaccess,
       kbi_ass_s.timecreated              AS date_first_submission,
       kbi_ass_g.grade                    AS grade_first_submission,
       kbi_ass_g.timemodified             AS grade_time_first_submission,
       first_submission_file.filename AS first_submission_file,
       kbi_cmc.completionstate,
       kbi_ass_sl.timemodified            AS date_last_submission,
       kbi_ass_gl.grade                   AS grade_last_submission,
       kbi_ass_gl.timemodified            AS grade_time_last_submission,
       last_submission_file.filename  AS last_submission_file,
       kbi_ass_s.attemptnumber,
       kbi_ass_sl.attemptnumber           AS attemptnumber2,
       kbi_sc.scale
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       LEFT JOIN mdl_context kbi_con ON kbi_con.contextlevel = 50 AND kbi_con.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_con.id AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign kbi_ass ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ass.course
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_submission kbi_ass_s
         ON kbi_ass_s.assignment = kbi_ass.id AND kbi_ass_s.attemptnumber = 0 AND kbi_ass_s.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_ass_s.status = 'submitted'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_ass_g ON kbi_ass_g.userid = kbi_ass_s.userid AND kbi_ass_g.assignment = kbi_ass_s.assignment AND
                                            kbi_ass_g.attemptnumber = kbi_ass_s.attemptnumber
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_f.itemid, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_f.filename) SEPARATOR ', ') AS filename
                  FROM mdl_files kbi_f
                  WHERE kbi_f.component = 'assignsubmission_file'
                    AND kbi_f.filearea = 'submission_files'
                    AND kbi_f.filesize > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_f.itemid) first_submission_file ON first_submission_file.itemid = kbi_ass_s.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_submission kbi_ass_sl
         ON kbi_ass_sl.assignment = kbi_ass.id AND kbi_ass_sl.latest = 1 AND kbi_ass_sl.userid = kbi_ass_s.userid AND kbi_ass_sl.id <> kbi_ass_s.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_ass_gl ON kbi_ass_gl.userid = kbi_ass_sl.userid AND kbi_ass_gl.assignment = kbi_ass_sl.assignment AND
                                             kbi_ass_gl.attemptnumber = kbi_ass_sl.attemptnumber
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_f.itemid, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_f.filename) SEPARATOR ', ') AS filename
                  FROM mdl_files kbi_f
                  WHERE kbi_f.component = 'assignsubmission_file'
                    AND kbi_f.filearea = 'submission_files'
                    AND kbi_f.filesize > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_f.itemid) last_submission_file ON last_submission_file.itemid = kbi_ass_sl.id
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'assign'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_ass.course AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_ass.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_ass_s.userid AND kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi
         ON kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_ass.course AND kbi_gi.itemtype = 'mod' AND kbi_gi.itemmodule = 'assign' AND kbi_gi.iteminstance = kbi_ass.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_scale kbi_sc ON kbi_sc.id = kbi_gi.scaleid
WHERE kbi_u.id IS NOT NULL
